slides.title: What is DALP?
slides.subtitle: The foundation for digital asset management

slides.title: A Complete Platform
slides.body:
The Digital Asset Lifecycle Platform (DALP) enables organizations to issue, manage, and transfer digital assets on blockchain networks.

• Tokenization of real-world assets
• Automated lifecycle management
• Built-in compliance controls
• Enterprise-grade security

slides.title: Four Key Capabilities
slides.item1:
Token issuance
Create governed digital assets with configurable parameters, issuance controls, and reusable launch patterns for new products.
slides.item2:
Lifecycle management
Run transfers, servicing events, approvals, and operational changes on one platform instead of scattered tooling.
slides.item3:
Compliance engine
Link identity, eligibility, and transfer restrictions so policy is enforced before execution, not checked afterward.
slides.item4:
Operational visibility
Give teams monitoring, audit evidence, and runtime insight into asset activity once products are live.

slides.title: End-to-End Lifecycle
slides.col1:
Creation & Issuance
• Define asset parameters
• Set transfer rules
• Configure compliance checks
• Deploy on blockchain
slides.col2:
Ongoing Management
• Transfer & settlement
• Corporate actions
• Compliance monitoring
• Reporting & audit
